title: Managing a portfolio across multiple chains
author: Cryptool
excerpt_html: Tracking assets spread across MultiversX, Ethereum, and BNB Chain is hard. Here's how Cryptool brings everything into one multichain dashboard.
content_html:
Most active investors hold assets across several chains and a dozen wallets. Reconciling that by hand is error-prone and slow.

One dashboard, every chain

Cryptool aggregates balances and positions across MultiversX, Ethereum, and BNB Chain — with Polygon, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Optimism, and Solana queued — into a single non-custodial view.

Why it matters

A unified portfolio means cleaner reporting, faster decisions, and fewer missed positions.
